name: Wuthering Salon
desc4: When the equipper uses an <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, their Anomaly Proficiency increases by 25, stacking up to 2 times, and lasting 40s; repeated triggers reset the duration. When the equipper triggers <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct>, their DMG increases by 18% for 40s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
story: The plays of Spotlight Theater reportedly drew not only from the revelations of a Bangboo prophet, but also wove in anecdotes about the renowned members of Roscaelifer. Spanning two eras, these productions were filled with the Bangboo world's musings on human society.
